company_context: The AI Customer Support Platform for Every Business - Crisp NEW! Build AI Agents with Crisp Augment your customer experience. AI made to support your team & customers. All-in-one Omnichannel inbox AI Agents Build your AI workflows Flat pricing Lower your cost per agent Get your AI Agent Signup 14 days free trial — All Crisp features — No card required Discover Crisp Video, 2 mins Trusted by 10,000 companies of all sizes One platform to delight your teams and customers Automate 50% of your inquiries with AI, let your teams focus on what matters. AI Helpdesk Give superpowers to your teams and customers. Chat widget Support from your website & mobile apps. Shared Inbox Centralize your inbound communications. Knowledge Base Make your customers more autonomous. Support CRM Organize your customer data in a CRM. Support Analytics Monitor and track your teams' performances. Included in the Crisp Plus plan Build your perfect AI Agent in 4 steps Step 1 Train your AI Teach Crisp about your product or business, using the public and private resources you already have. We automatically browse your website for you, but you can also import PDFs and write Knowledge Base articles. 2 Create a Workflow Create an AI Agent workflow, using our no-code AI Agent builder or browse through our library of templates to kickstart your new support experience. 3 Test & Deploy Workflow Deploy your AI Agent workflow, choosing which messaging channel you want it to trigger from: Web chat widget, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, and even email. 4 Validate & Measure See the messages that your users exchanged with your AI Agent. Refine your AI Agent if an answer was invalid. Quickly iterate to automate most of your customer support. Create my AI Agent now Shared Inbox Centralize all your inbound messages All your inbound conversations from all channels go into one collaborative inbox. Your team can access, manage, and respond to messages efficiently. Chat Widget Email WhatsApp Messenger + 8 other channels See all messaging channels Knowledge Base Let your users search for answers themselves Leverage the power of asynchronous communication by creating, editing, and managing help articles. Create your own help center that fits your brand. Learn more on Crisp Knowledge Base Automations Craft tailor-made automated internal workflows Not ready for customer-facing AI agents? Crisp lets you craft internal workflows to speed up teams' replies and reduce manual work through a no-code solution. Learn more on the Crisp AI Chatbot As your business grows, you're facing more complex queries. Crisp makes it easy to solve them all. Chat Widget Instantly support leads and customers with a chat widget Add a chat widget to your website or Web app in minutes. From landing pages to native iOS, Android, or React apps, talk to visitors in real-time, offer support when it counts, and guide users all the way to conversion. Learn more Support CRM Keep information about your customers in Crisp's built-in CRM Sy

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their customer support operations. I came across your company, Crisp, and was impressed with your AI-powered customer support platform. I think our solution could complement your existing technology and help you better analyze customer interactions.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, thanks for the call, Alex. I'm John, the CTO here at Crisp. We're always looking for ways to improve our customer support, but I have to say, we've already invested heavily in our current infrastructure. What makes DeepData AI unique, and how do you think it can help us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question, John. DeepData AI uses machine learning algorithms to analyze customer interactions across multiple channels, providing valuable insights that can help you optimize your support workflows. Our solution can integrate with your existing platform, and we've seen significant reductions in support ticket resolution time and increases in customer satisfaction for our clients.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I see. That sounds interesting, but we're currently in the midst of implementing some new features and don't want to disrupt our existing workflows. How long would it take to integrate DeepData AI with our platform, and what kind of resources would we need to dedicate to the project?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: The integration process typically takes around 2-3 weeks, depending on the complexity of your setup. We provide a dedicated support team to ensure a smooth onboarding process, and our solution is designed to be scalable and flexible. As for resources, we've found that our clients typically need to dedicate a few hours per week to fine-tuning the system and reviewing the insights it provides.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Okay, that's reasonable. However, I have to say that we're also exploring other options, including some of our existing partners who offer similar solutions. What sets DeepData AI apart from the competition, and what kind of ROI can we expect from implementing your solution?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: We've found that our solution provides a significant competitive advantage due to its advanced machine learning capabilities and ease of use. As for ROI, our clients have seen an average reduction of 25% in support costs and a 30% increase in customer satisfaction. We'd be happy to provide a customized ROI analysis for your company to help you understand the potential benefits.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the information, Alex, but to be honest, the price point you quoted earlier is a bit higher than we're comfortable with. We're a growing company, and while we see the value in DeepData AI, we need to prioritize our spend. I think we'll have to pass on this opportunity for now – the cost just doesn't justify the potential benefits for us at this time.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the price concern and potentially offer a customized pricing plan or a trial to demonstrate the value of DeepData AI. Sentiment: Neutral

parsed.feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the price concern and potentially offer a customized pricing plan or a trial to demonstrate the value of DeepData AI. Sentiment: Neutral
